scripts.test:loop: bun src/cli.ts render test-e2e/loop.wav --output loop.mp4 --size 640x360 --fps 24 --quality preview --seed loop-smoke --overwrite
scripts.showcase:loop: bun src/cli.ts render test-e2e/loop.wav --output test-e2e/loop.mp4 --resolution fullhd --ratio 16:9 --fps 24 --quality final --seed loop-smoke --overwrite
